Toggle the relaxing of border vertices.
Select vertices. Shift to extend select. Drag mouse to select multiple.
strings.Toggle selection of faces oriented away: Toggle selection of faces oriented away from the camera.
strings.Toggle soft-selection by connected edges: Toggle soft-selection by connected edges's length.
strings.Toggle fitting the bevel shape be planar: Toggle fitting the bevel shape be planar.
strings.Slide selected vertices along connected: Slide selected vertices along connected edges.
Slide selected vertices along connected edges by a fixed offset.
Slide selected vertices along connected edges by a relative offset.
strings.Move selected vertices to a best fit pla: Move selected vertices to a best fit plane.
strings.Merge selected vertices into a single av: Merge selected vertices into a single average position.
strings.Merge selected vertices with a given pro: Merge selected vertices with a given proximity.
strings.Merge selected vertices to a picked poin: Merge selected vertices to a picked point.
strings.Heal selected vertices fixing geometry t: Heal selected vertices fixing geometry that should be merged.
strings.Soften and smooth edges created by auto-: Soften and smooth edges created by auto-folding.
strings.Pin UV coordinates when transforming the: Pin UV coordinates when transforming the edited mesh.
strings.Toggle vertex normals in the viewport wh: Toggle vertex normals in the viewport when in vertex mode.
strings.In Demo Mode some key pressed will be di: In Demo Mode some key pressed will be displayed in the viewport.
Align the Manipulator Gizmo to view.
strings.Align the Manipulator Gizmo to world spa: Align the Manipulator Gizmo to world space.
strings.Align the Manipulator Gizmo to local spa: Align the Manipulator Gizmo to local space.
strings.Align the Manipulator Gizmo to custom or: Align the Manipulator Gizmo to custom orientation.
strings.When locked the Manipulator Gizmo will f: When locked the Manipulator Gizmo will follow the gizmo rotation.
Toggle the Manipulator Gizmo on or off.
strings.Toggle Sidebar docking between left and: Toggle Sidebar docking between left and right.
strings.%{extension_name} version %{version} is: %{extension_name} version %{version} is not compatible with this version of SketchUp and could not be loaded. Please check for updates to the extension.
Press ESC to return to soft-selection.
strings.Unable to find two sets of border edges: Unable to find two sets of border edges to bridge.
Cannot bridge border sets with forks.
strings.Selected border sets must contain the sa: Selected border sets must contain the same number of vertices to bridge.
strings.Pick point of origin for axes. Hold Shif: Pick point of origin for axes. Hold Shift = Pick orientation from an entity.
strings.Click a selected vertex to bevel by dist: Click a selected vertex to bevel by distance.
strings.Click a selected vertex to bevel by perc: Click a selected vertex to bevel by percentage.
strings.Click an edge or face to insert a vertex: Click an edge or face to insert a vertex. Press Ctrl to toggle soft edges.
strings.Pick a point where selected vertices sho: Pick a point where selected vertices should collapse to.
strings.Pick two points to move. Hold Shift = lo: Pick two points to move. Hold Shift = lock inference.
strings.Click an drag to adjust poke offset of s: Click an drag to adjust poke offset of selected faces. Use Ctrl or Shift to add/remove faces.
strings.Pick rotation plane and origin. Hold Shi: Pick rotation plane and origin. Hold Shift = align to face.
Pick rotation angle or enter value.
strings.Enter a scale ratio or pick a point for: Enter a scale ratio or pick a point for reference scale origin.
Click a point or drag a selection.
strings.Single-Click to add a point to selection: Single-Click to add a point to selection. Double-Click to end selection.
strings.Click a selected vertex to slide by dist: Click a selected vertex to slide by distance.
strings.Click a selected vertex to slide by perc: Click a selected vertex to slide by percentage.
strings.There was an unexpected server error whi: There was an unexpected server error while trying to activate the license. Please try again in a few moments. If the problem persists, please contact support.
strings.This is not a valid license key. Please: This is not a valid license key. Please check your input and try again.
strings.Note that a license for version 1 cannot: Note that a license for version 1 cannot be used to activate version 2. You will need a new license for version 2.
strings.Check the website for upgrade-discounts: Check the website for upgrade-discounts for existing customers.
strings.This license has been deactivated. Pleas: This license has been deactivated. Please contact support.
strings.There was an unexpected error trying to: There was an unexpected error trying to activate the license.
strings.Value must be no more than %{num}: Value must be no more than %{num}
strings.Value must be no less than %{num}: Value must be no less than %{num}
Failed to connect to the license server.
strings.Please check if any firewalls are blocki: Please check if any firewalls are blocking internet connections.
strings.You might want to try to connect via VPN: You might want to try to connect via VPN as some ISPs have been known to block large IP-ranges that could affect the license server.
strings.Vertex Tools is not activated. Please ob: Vertex Tools is not activated. Please obtain a valid license.
strings.If you believe you see this message in e: If you believe you see this message in error, then please contact for support.
strings.Your Vertex Tools license has expired. P: Your Vertex Tools license has expired. Please make sure you have a valid license.
strings.Your Vertex Tools trial license has expi: Your Vertex Tools trial license has expired. Please purchase a full license in order to continue using the product.
strings.Your Vertex Tools beta build has expired: Your Vertex Tools beta build has expired.
strings.There was an unexpected error obtaining: There was an unexpected error obtaining your license. Please make sure you have a working internet connection and valid license.
strings.Language options require restart of Sket: Language options require restart of SketchUp for changes to take effect.
strings.Customize the tool that should be active: Customize the tool that should be active when vertex mode is activated.
strings.Customize the size of vertices in the vi: Customize the size of vertices in the viewport.
strings.Customize the size of vertex normals in: Customize the size of vertex normals in the viewport.
strings.Toggle to add Vertex Tools to the Sketch: Toggle to add Vertex Tools to the SketchUp context menu for quick access when right clicking in the viewport.
